nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview: research question, sub-questions, directory structure, planned methodology, data sources, scope, early-scaffold status.

nodes.name: proposal.md
nodes.summary: Thesis proposal draft: research question, sub-questions, background/motivation (the friend's saints question and 2 Maccabees), related work, data sources, methodology, expected contribution, timeline, scope guardrails.

nodes.name: historical_notes.md
nodes.summary: Personal research-journal: entry template plus one real entry on the saints/2 Maccabees question, with an IEEE-style reference list.

nodes.name: canon_lists.md
nodes.summary: Draft reference listing books in the Protestant (66), Catholic (73), and Orthodox (76-81) canons, plus key historical decision points to research.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Empty placeholder keeping the empty data/raw directory tracked.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Empty placeholder keeping the empty outputs/figures directory tracked.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependencies: pandas, numpy, nltk, spacy, bertopic, scikit-learn, networkx, matplotlib, plotly, jupyter.

nodes.name: data_loader.py
nodes.summary: Utilities for loading canon book lists and raw scriptural texts; load_canon_list is unimplemented (raises NotImplementedError), load_raw_text reads from data/raw/ which is empty.

nodes.name: align_corpus.py
nodes.summary: Working set-comparison logic: align_books builds a presence matrix across traditions, unique_to_tradition filters it. Not yet wired to real data.

nodes.name: graph_builder.py
nodes.summary: Working NetworkX graph builders for canon overlap and translation lineage; lineage graph currently uses hardcoded placeholder edges.

nodes.name: 01_canon_overlap.ipynb
nodes.summary: Placeholder notebook for canon overlap analysis; only sets up src path import, no analysis yet.

nodes.name: 02_translation_lineage.ipynb
nodes.summary: Placeholder notebook for translation lineage; no analysis yet.

nodes.name: 03_topic_modeling.ipynb
nodes.summary: Placeholder notebook for topic modeling (deuterocanonical vs protocanonical); no analysis yet.

nodes.name: 04_visualization.ipynb
nodes.summary: Placeholder notebook for final visualizations; no analysis yet.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project overview, thesis proposal, and research-journal documents describing the project's research question and methodology.

layers.name: Data & Outputs
layers.description: Raw source data placeholders, canon metadata reference lists, and generated figure output directories.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Project-level and tooling configuration, including Python dependencies.

layers.name: Source Code
layers.description: Core Python modules for loading canon data, aligning corpora across traditions, and building comparison graphs.

layers.name: Analysis Notebooks
layers.description: Jupyter notebooks that consume the src modules to compute canon overlap, translation lineage, topic modeling, and final visualizations.
